description: Product Description Beach Toys / Bucket and Spade/ Foldable Buckets for Beach The hot summer is here! Let's have fun on the beach! Do your children like playing with sand very much? Use our foldable bucket and shovel beach set to build your own sandcastle with the children. Easy to Use: The foldable bucket only needs to be pulled gently, and it can be fully unfolded or semi-unfolded as required. When the folding bucket is not needed, press it down along the edge of the bucket. Specification Name: Bucket and Spade Material: Plastic Size: 8.1 X 6.7 X 1.7in Color: multiple colors. Quantity: 6Pcs Capacity: 2.5L Package Included: Package Included: 1 X Foldable Bucket (Blue) 1 X Foldable Bucket (Pink) 1* Square Sand Shovel 1* Sand Rake 1* Beach Trowel 1* Beach Sifters Durable Beach Buckets for Kids: Made of high-quality plastic materials, it is safe to use, small in size, convenient to carry, durable, not easy to deform and damage, and can be played on the beach for a long time. Rich Sand Accessories: Our beach toy set includes a sand shovel, a sand rake and a sand-leaking shovel, each with a random color. The bright colors can help you know many colors when playing with children. Convenient to Carry: The foldable beach bucket can be folded, and the capacity of 2.5L can hold water, snow, ice, sand, etc. When going out for a picnic, it is also very convenient and practical. Perfect Gift: Our beach toys can be used as gifts and small prizes, which are excellent gifts for people and children who like to play with sand.
